scripts.pages:deploy: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location ..; npx --yes wrangler pages deploy (Join-Path (Get-Location) 'source/docs') --project-name recipe-book-bot-advanced-python-2026 --commit-dirty=true; Pop-Location"
scripts.cloudflare:deploy: npm run db:migrate:remote && npm run worker:deploy && npm run pages:deploy
